title: hippion verticillatum var. maritimum
intro: Hippion verticillatum var. maritimum, also known as Sea Holly, is a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its bitter compounds and saponins, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sea Holly include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Sea Holly can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
